title: Vanilla Backport x Regions Unexplored
description: Adds Regions Unexplored compatibility for Vanilla Backport.
body:
## [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) x [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4579e0b0784fa5a36f9ba446c25d9feba4bd4fe.png) This datapack allows [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) variants to spawn naturally in [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) biomes. Animals are not included due to the fact Regions Unexplored already contains tags that makes them spawn in their dedicated biomes! #
Wolf Spawn Locations - **Ashen Wolf** - Alpha Grove - Cold Boreal Taiga - Frozen Pine Taiga - Deciduous Forest - Grassland # - **Black Wolf** - Blackwood Taiga - Mountains - Old Growth Bayou - Pine Slopes - Pine Taiga # - **Chestnut Wolf** - Blackwood Taiga - Boreal Taiga - Old Growth Bayou - Towering Cliffs # - **Rusty Wolf** - Bamboo Forest - Rainforest - Sparse Rainforest - Tropics # - **Snowy Wolf** - Frozen Pine Taiga - Frozen Tundra - Icy Heights - Spires # - **Spotted Wolf** - Baobab Savanna - Steppe - Dry Bushland # - **Striped Wolf** - Arid Mountains - Dry Bushland - Joshua Desert - Outback # - **Woods Wolf** - Rainforest - Deciduous Forest - Magnolia Woodland - Redwoods - Sparse Redwoods
# - You need compatibility for leaf litters and more? Check out [Vanilla Backport Compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vb-compat)! - You're using Terralith or BWG? Then check out [Vanilla Backport: Terralith & BWG Compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vanilla-backport-terralith-bwg-compat)!
